description_long: This is a robust, multi-tiered stone fountain with a circular base and a cylindrical central column. The fountain features a sculpted animal figure, possibly a lion or similar creature, perched atop the central column, adding a decorative and classical touch. The lower section consists of a wide, circular basin with a raised rim, surrounded by stone tiles and steps that create a sense of elevation and prominence. The front of the fountain displays a spout or water outlet integrated into a semi-circular protrusion, suggesting the primary water feature. The stone surfaces are weathered, with visible seams and engraved panels, indicating age and craftsmanship. The entire structure sits on a square, tiled platform, providing stability and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment.
description: A multi-tiered stone fountain with a sculpted animal figure on top, circular basin, and a prominent water spout on a raised, tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main water spout, semi-circular basin extension, and the animal sculpture atop the central column.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered stonework, steps, and the profile of the animal sculpture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the column, engraved panels, and the absence of water outlets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved stonework, steps, and partial view of the animal sculpture.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is topped with a sculpted animal figure, likely a lion, which serves as a decorative focal point. The stonework includes engraved panels and a semi-circular protrusion with a spout, adding classical and ornamental elements. The overall design is traditional, with attention to symmetry and craftsmanship.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular, tiered, and features a raised rim with a semi-circular extension at the front for the water spout. Steps and stone blocks surround the basin, providing structural support and visual layering.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the main water feature appears to be a single spout integrated into the front of the basin.
